value.found_quote: Use a Private Service Connect interface with Agent Platform Runtime — Learn to configure a Private Service Connect (PSC) interface to securely connect your agent to your VPC and manage internet access.
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes a guide titled "Use a Private Service Connect interface with Agent Platform Runtime" with a description matching the claim: it allows users to configure a PSC interface to securely connect agents to their VPC and manage internet access. The page also has a navigation entry "Use Private Service Connect (PSC) interfaces" under Agent Runtime. Additionally, the page carries a "Preview" banner at the top, indicating this feature is pre-GA.
